name: Scramblers Golf Club - Johns Island
about: Scramblers Golf Club is a private, member-only indoor golf simulation venue providing 24/7 access to simulator bays for practice and gameplay. Members can use live swing data for improvement, play on over 100 virtual golf courses, participate in 13 mini-games, engage in peer-to-peer play, and attend special events and tournaments. The facility is designed for game improvement, community building, and convenient access with a focus on technology and affordable monthly memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to simulator bays for maximum flexibility
Premium Uneekor launch monitors providing highly accurate swing data
Access to over 100+ golf courses and 13 mini-games for diverse gameplay
Strong community focus with leagues and special tournaments
Top-tier GSPro simulation software for realistic ball physics

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring their own food and drinks; no on-site kitchen mentioned.
Members are allowed to bring their own drinks; no bar service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-class camera IR-based launch monitor with patented ball and club tracking technology.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a private club, members are allowed to bring their own food and drinks and are asked to be respectful and clean up after themselves.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes, but members can book tee times for simulator bays to play virtual rounds.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue allows children as guests of members and includes a focus on community events, making it suitable for families with junior golfers.
